dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9216 IH: Double the Wage for Overtime Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Casar (for himself, Ms. Jayapal, Mr. Horsford, Ms. Ansari, Ms. Norton, Mrs. Watson Coleman, Mr. Jackson of Illinois, Ms. Simon, Ms. Randall, Ms. Titus, Mr. García of Illinois, Mr. Larson of Connecticut, Mr. Espaillat, Ms. Tlaib, Ms. Lee of Pennsylvania, Ms. Chu, Mrs. Ramirez, Ms. McBride, and Mr. Deluzio) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Education and Workforce

form.official-title: To amend the Fair Labor Standards Act of 1938 to adjust the rate employers pay for overtime hours from one and one-half to two times the regular rate.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Double the Wage for Overtime Act of 2026.

subsection.text: The Fair Labor Standards Act of 1938 (29 U.S.C. 201 et seq.) is amended—

paragraph.text: in section 7, by striking one and one-half each place it appears and inserting two; and

subparagraph.text: in subsection (b)(29), by striking one and one-half and inserting two;
in subsection (h), in the matter following paragraph (2)(B), by striking one and one-half and inserting two;
in subsection (i)(2)(B), by striking one and one-half and inserting two; and
in subsection (j)(2)(B), by striking one and one-half and inserting two.

subsection.text: The amendments made by this Act shall take effect on the date that is 180 days after the date of enactment of this Act.
